Class cashierModel.InventoryOption

java.lang.Object
org.posSystem.FrontendGUI.CashierGUI.cashierModel.InventoryOption
Enclosing class:
cashierModel
public static class cashierModel.InventoryOption extends Object
Inventory option DTO used by the Add Menu Item ingredient dropdown.

  • Constructor Details

    • InventoryOption

      public InventoryOption(int invItemId, String itemName, String unitOfMeasure)
      Creates an inventory option record for UI display.
      Parameters:
      invItemId - inventory item id
      itemName - inventory item display name
      unitOfMeasure - base unit of measure for the inventory item

  • Method Details

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a user-friendly dropdown label for this inventory option.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      formatted inventory option label
